title: Cozy Cel
description: Ce style présente une illustration numérique contemporaine chaleureuse, caractérisée par des contours épais, texturés et dessinés à la main, ainsi que par des aplats de couleurs en cel-shading. Il utilise une palette douce et terreuse contrastant avec des reflets de bords brillants et néon, créant une esthétique de jeu indépendant lo-fi avec des formes simplifiées et trapues.
description_en: This style features contemporary cozy digital illustration characterized by thick, textured, hand-drawn linework and flat, cel-shaded color blocking. It utilizes a muted, earthy palette contrasted by striking, neon-like glowing edge highlights, creating a warm, lo-fi indie game aesthetic with simplified, chunky forms.
description_fr: Ce style présente une illustration numérique contemporaine chaleureuse, caractérisée par des contours épais, texturés et dessinés à la main, ainsi que par des aplats de couleurs en cel-shading. Il utilise une palette douce et terreuse contrastant avec des reflets de bords brillants et néon, créant une esthétique de jeu indépendant lo-fi avec des formes simplifiées et trapues.
prompt: Digital 2D illustration, cozy indie game concept art style. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. Render the scene using thick, rough, dark, organic outlines that resemble a highly textured digital pencil or heavy marker brush. The line work must be exceptionally bold and chunky, exhibiting slight jitter, natural wobbly contours, and pressure variation to maintain a distinctively hand-drawn, artisanal charm. Employ a flat color blocking technique with minimal, hard-edged cel-shading and absolutely no soft gradients. The color palette should feature muted, earthy base tones dominated by {{primary_color}} and supported by {{secondary_color}} shadow shapes that anchor the composition. Contrast these muted bases with striking, neon-like glowing edge highlights in vibrant {{accent_color}}, particularly applied to structural rims, translucent boundaries, or prominent contours to create a subtle magical luminescence. The lighting anatomy is extremely simplified and stylized, relying on stark, flat shadow polygons rather than smooth volumetric transitions. The texture profile consists of perfectly smooth, opaque color fills heavily contrasted against the toothy, rough grain of the dark ink contours. The overall atmosphere is intensely whimsical, relaxed, and lo-fi. Ensure all forms are simplified and slightly chunky, deliberately avoiding hyper-realism or intricate micro-details. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners., digital 2d illustration, thick rough outlines, flat color blocking, cel-shading, lo-fi aesthetic, cozy indie concept art, chunky linework, glowing neon accents, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

The thick dark outlines of the subjects interact directly with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the scene can extend beyond the visible frame and be smoothly cropped by the image boundaries., digital 2d illustration, thick rough outlines, flat color blocking, cel-shading, lo-fi aesthetic, cozy indie concept art, chunky linework, glowing neon accents
background_prompt: A pure background environment in a cozy indie game digital 2D illustration style. The scene is composed of flat color blocks in muted {{primary_color}} and subtle {{secondary_color}} shades, creating an atmospheric, lo-fi setting. Structural and environmental elements are defined by thick, rough, dark organic outlines with a textured digital pencil feel. Flat, hard-edged cel-shaded shadows add depth without gradients. Occasional glowing edge highlights in vibrant {{accent_color}} trace the silhouettes of the background architecture or abstract organic shapes. The lighting is simplified and whimsical, offering a relaxed, static mood.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure background environment in a cozy indie game digital 2D illustration style. The scene is composed of flat color blocks in muted {{primary_color}} and subtle {{secondary_color}} shades, creating an atmospheric, lo-fi setting. Structural and environmental elements are defined by thick, rough, dark organic outlines with a textured digital pencil feel. Flat, hard-edged cel-shaded shadows add depth without gradients. Occasional glowing edge highlights in vibrant {{accent_color}} trace the silhouettes of the background architecture or abstract organic shapes. The lighting is simplified and whimsical, offering a relaxed, static mood. In the foreground, a decorative framing element made of chunky, stylized organic shapes and geometric borders frames the invisible subject. Both the background scene and this thick-lined foreground frame transition seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, with the rough ink edges contrasting sharply against the solid backdrop.
